message:
fix(node): reject mixed trace IDs and orphan parent spans in conformance checks

Extend TraceStore::check_conformance with a two-pass approach: first
pass collects valid contexts and checks trace_id consistency across
artifacts in a flow, second pass detects parent_span_id references to
spans not present in the checked artifact set. Add integration tests
for both mixed-trace-ID and orphan-parent rejection paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
